mandatoryReviewCriteria.title: Code follows established patterns and conventions
items: Code structure follows project architecture patterns

mandatoryReviewCriteria.title: All functions have appropriate error handling
items: Exceptions are caught and handled properly
Error messages are informative and actionable
Resource cleanup guaranteed in finally blocks

mandatoryReviewCriteria.title: Security considerations are addressed
items: Input validation implemented for all user inputs
SQL injection prevention through parameterized queries
XSS prevention through proper output encoding
Authentication and authorization checks in place

mandatoryReviewCriteria.title: Code is properly documented
items: README files updated for new features
